notes: Builds the ZTARE adversarial multi-agent workbench (tool-build) and uses it to generate 453 adversarial debate logs from which a 9-strategy taxonomy of specification-gaming is derived via qualitative analysis of code artifacts. Two controlled two-judge detection baseline experiments (isolated-snippet, full-thesis) compare Gemini vs Claude judges against adversarial execution on frozen specimen suites (benchmark-evaluation/controlled-experiment). Includes cross-mutator replication matrix and an off-matrix ablation variant. No human participants; human/LLM-written code used only as generated artifacts.
